behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names the pagemeta.Source struct, Value field, and ValueAsOpenReadSeekCloser() method which are what the tests exercise.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes the symptom (shared state between readers) and required behavior (independent readers) without specifying the code change.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Reader independence, full content from each reader, and package tests passing are all covered.
